---
title: "Life tables (compartimento) — DEMOPAST (test)"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.4/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" />
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/papaparse@5.4.1/papaparse.min.js"></script>

<div style="background:#fff3cd;border:1px solid #ffeeba;border-radius:4px;padding:0.5rem 1rem;margin-bottom:1rem;font-size:0.9rem;">
  <strong>Test section</strong> — abridged life tables by <em>compartimento</em>
  (historical region) and sex at seven decennial benchmarks. The map colours each
  province by the life expectancy (e₀) of the compartimento it belongs to.
  <a href="index.html">← back to test home</a>
</div>

<div class="slider-container">
  <label for="yearSlider" class="year-label">Year: <span id="yearDisplay">—</span></label><br>
  <input type="range" id="yearSlider" min="0" max="0" step="1" value="0" style="width:60%;max-width:500px;">
  <div id="yearTicks" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;max-width:500px;margin:0 auto;"></div>
</div>

<div style="text-align:center;margin:1rem 0;">
  <label style="font-weight:bold;">Sex: </label>
  <select id="sexSelect" style="padding:4px 8px;font-size:1rem;">
    <option value="T">Total</option>
    <option value="M">Males</option>
    <option value="F">Females</option>
  </select>
  &nbsp;&nbsp;
  <span style="font-size:0.95rem;color:#555;">Map shows life expectancy at birth (e₀) by compartimento</span>
</div>

<div style="display:flex;gap:1.5rem;align-items:flex-start;flex-wrap:wrap;">
  <div style="flex:0 0 38%;min-width:320px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.75rem;">
    <div id="map" style="width:100%;height:560px;"></div>
    <div id="legendWrapper">
      <div class="legend-header">
        <span class="legend-title">Legend</span>
        <button id="legendToggle" type="button">Hide</button>
      </div>
      <div id="legendContent" class="map-legend"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="compInfo" style="flex:1 1 55%;min-width:320px;padding:1rem;background:#f8f9fa;border-radius:4px;max-height:900px;overflow-y:auto;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;justify-content:space-between;">
      <h4 id="compName" style="margin-top:0;"></h4>
      <button id="resetComp" type="button" style="display:none;font-size:0.8rem;padding:2px 8px;cursor:pointer;">← REGNO (nazionale)</button>
    </div>
    <h5 id="fullTableTitle" style="margin-top:0.25rem;margin-bottom:0.25rem;">Full life table</h5>
    <table id="fullTable" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.8rem;margin-bottom:0.75rem;"></table>
    <h5 style="margin-bottom:0.25rem;">Survival curve l<sub>x</sub> (per 100,000 born)</h5>
    <div><canvas id="lxChart" style="max-height:260px;"></canvas></div>
    <h5 style="margin-top:1rem;margin-bottom:0.25rem;">Death probability q<sub>x</sub> (log scale)</h5>
    <div><canvas id="qxChart" style="max-height:220px;"></canvas></div>
    <h5 style="margin-top:1rem;margin-bottom:0.25rem;">e₀ across the seven benchmarks</h5>
    <table id="seriesTable" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.85rem;margin-bottom:0.5rem;"></table>
    <p id="seriesNote" style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#777;margin-top:0;"></p>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const LTCOMP = '../data/mortality/lifetables_comp.csv';
const BYPROV = '../data/mortality/e0_comp_byprov.csv';
const E0COMP = '../data/mortality/e0_comp.csv';
const YEARS = [1871, 1881, 1901, 1911, 1921, 1931, 1936];
const DEFAULT_YEAR = 1931;
const COLORS = ['#fff7fb','#ece2f0','#d0d1e6','#a6bddb','#67a9cf','#3690c0','#02818a','#016450'];
const SEXCLR = {M: '#1d4ed8', F: '#be123c', T: '#475569'};

// COD_PROV -> compartimento name (mirrors COMP_PROVS in build_lifetables_comp.py)
const COMP_PROVS = {
  'PIEMONTE':[1,2,3,4,5,6,7], 'LIGURIA':[8,9,10,11],
  'LOMBARDIA':[12,13,14,15,16,17,18,19,20], 'VENEZIA TRIDENTINA':[21,22],
  'VENETO':[23,24,25,26,27,28,29,30], 'VENEZIA GIULIA E ZARA':[31,32],
  'EMILIA':[33,34,35,36,37,38,39,40], 'MARCHE':[41,42,43,44],
  'TOSCANA':[45,46,47,48,49,50,51,52,53], 'UMBRIA':[54,55],
  'LAZIO':[56,57,58,59,60], 'CAMPANIA':[61,62,63,64,65],
  'ABRUZZI E MOLISE':[66,67,68,69,70], 'PUGLIE':[71,72,73,74,75],
  'BASILICATA':[76,77], 'CALABRIE':[78,79,80],
  'SICILIA':[81,82,83,84,85,86,87,88,89], 'SARDEGNA':[90,91,92]
};
const PROV2COMP = {};
for (const [c, codes] of Object.entries(COMP_PROVS))
  for (const cod of codes) PROV2COMP[cod] = c;

const NATIONAL = {name: 'REGNO'};
// lt[comp][year][sex] = [rows by age_lo]
// byprov[year][cod] = {e0_T,e0_M,e0_F}; e0comp[comp][year] = {e0_T,e0_M,e0_F,flags}
let lt = {}, byprov = {}, e0comp = {}, geojsonCache = {};
let currentLayer = null, currentBreaks = null, selected = NATIONAL;
let lxChart = null, qxChart = null;

const map = L.map('map', {zoomControl:false, attributionControl:false, dragging:false,
  scrollWheelZoom:false, doubleClickZoom:false, boxZoom:false, keyboard:false,
  touchZoom:false}).setView([41.5, 12.5], 6);

const getYear = () => YEARS[+document.getElementById('yearSlider').value];
const getSex = () => document.getElementById('sexSelect').value;
const fnum = v => (v === '' || v == null) ? null : +v;

async function loadData() {
  const [lc, bp, ec] = await Promise.all([
    fetch(LTCOMP).then(r => r.text()),
    fetch(BYPROV).then(r => r.text()),
    fetch(E0COMP).then(r => r.text())
  ]);
  Papa.parse(lc, {header:true, skipEmptyLines:true, dynamicTyping:true}).data.forEach(function(r) {
    if (!r.compartimento || !r.sex) return;
    const byYear = (lt[r.compartimento] = lt[r.compartimento] || {});
    const bySex = (byYear[r.year] = byYear[r.year] || {});
    (bySex[r.sex] = bySex[r.sex] || []).push(r);
  });
  for (const comp of Object.keys(lt))
    for (const y of Object.keys(lt[comp]))
      for (const s of Object.keys(lt[comp][y]))
        lt[comp][y][s].sort((a, b) => a.age_lo - b.age_lo);
  Papa.parse(bp, {header:true, skipEmptyLines:true}).data.forEach(function(r) {
    if (!r.COD_PROV) return;
    (byprov[r.year] = byprov[r.year] || {})[+r.COD_PROV] =
      {e0_T: fnum(r.e0_T), e0_M: fnum(r.e0_M), e0_F: fnum(r.e0_F)};
  });
  Papa.parse(ec, {header:true, skipEmptyLines:true}).data.forEach(function(r) {
    if (!r.compartimento) return;
    (e0comp[r.compartimento] = e0comp[r.compartimento] || {})[+r.year] =
      {e0_T: fnum(r.e0_T), e0_M: fnum(r.e0_M), e0_F: fnum(r.e0_F), flags: r.flags};
  });
}

function provValue(year, sex, cod) {
  const rec = (byprov[year] || {})[cod];
  return rec ? rec['e0_' + sex] : null;
}

function computeBreaks() {
  const sex = getSex();
  const seen = {};
  const values = Object.values(byprov[getYear()] || {})
    .map(r => r['e0_' + sex]).filter(v => v != null)
    .filter(v => (seen[v] ? false : (seen[v] = true)))   // one value per compartimento level
    .sort((a, b) => a - b);
  if (!values.length) return [0, 1];
  const breaks = [];
  for (let i = 1; i <= 7; i++)
    breaks.push(values[Math.min(Math.floor(values.length * i / 8), values.length - 1)]);
  return [...new Set(breaks)].sort((a, b) => a - b);
}

function getColor(v, breaks) {
  if (v == null) return '#e5e7eb';
  for (let i = breaks.length - 1; i >= 0; i--)
    if (v > breaks[i]) return COLORS[Math.min(i + 1, COLORS.length - 1)];
  return COLORS[0];
}

function style(feature) {
  const v = provValue(getYear(), getSex(), feature.properties.COD_PROV);
  return {fillColor: getColor(v, currentBreaks), weight: 0.8, opacity: 1,
          color: '#94a3b8', fillOpacity: 0.85};
}

function tooltipHtml(cod) {
  const comp = PROV2COMP[cod];
  const rec = (byprov[getYear()] || {})[cod];
  const f = x => x == null ? '—' : x.toFixed(1);
  if (!comp) return 'no compartimento';
  if (!rec) return '<strong>' + comp + '</strong><br>no data ' + getYear();
  return '<strong>' + comp + '</strong> — ' + getYear() +
    '<br>e₀ T ' + f(rec.e0_T) + ' · M ' + f(rec.e0_M) + ' · F ' + f(rec.e0_F);
}

function onEachFeature(feature, layer) {
  const cod = feature.properties.COD_PROV;
  layer.bindTooltip(() => tooltipHtml(cod), {sticky: true});
  layer.on({
    mouseover: function(e) { e.target.setStyle({weight: 2, color: '#0f766e', fillOpacity: 1}); e.target.bringToFront(); },
    mouseout: function(e) { if (currentLayer) currentLayer.resetStyle(e.target); },
    click: function() {
      const comp = PROV2COMP[cod];
      if (comp) { selected = {name: comp}; showComp(); }
    }
  });
}

function fmtAge(g) {
  return g === '0' ? '0' : g === '1_4' ? '1–4' : g === '85plus' ? '85+'
       : String(g).replace('_', '–');
}

function rowsFor(comp, year, sex) {
  return (((lt[comp] || {})[year] || {})[sex]) || null;
}

function renderCharts(comp, year) {
  const mkDatasets = field => ['M','F'].map(s => {
    const rows = rowsFor(comp, year, s) || [];
    return {label: {M:'Males', F:'Females'}[s],
            data: rows.map(r => ({x: r.age_lo, y: r[field]})),
            borderColor: SEXCLR[s], backgroundColor: SEXCLR[s],
            pointRadius: 2, borderWidth: 1.5, tension: 0.2};
  });
  if (lxChart) lxChart.destroy();
  lxChart = new Chart(document.getElementById('lxChart').getContext('2d'), {
    type: 'line', data: {datasets: mkDatasets('lx')},
    options: {responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      plugins: {legend: {position: 'bottom'}},
      scales: {x: {type: 'linear', min: 0, max: 90, title: {display: true, text: 'age'}},
               y: {min: 0, max: 100000}}}
  });
  if (qxChart) qxChart.destroy();
  qxChart = new Chart(document.getElementById('qxChart').getContext('2d'), {
    type: 'line', data: {datasets: mkDatasets('qx')},
    options: {responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      plugins: {legend: {position: 'bottom'}},
      scales: {x: {type: 'linear', min: 0, max: 90, title: {display: true, text: 'age'}},
               y: {type: 'logarithmic'}}}
  });
}

function renderFullTable(comp, year) {
  // follow the sex selector, fall back to total
  const fSex = rowsFor(comp, year, getSex()) ? getSex() : 'T';
  const fRows = rowsFor(comp, year, fSex);
  if (!fRows) {
    document.getElementById('fullTableTitle').textContent = 'Full life table';
    document.getElementById('fullTable').innerHTML =
      '<tr><td>No life table for this compartimento in ' + year + '</td></tr>';
    return;
  }
  document.getElementById('fullTableTitle').textContent =
    'Full life table — ' + {T:'total population', M:'males', F:'females'}[fSex];
  document.getElementById('fullTable').innerHTML =
    '<tr style="border-bottom:2px solid #ccc;"><th style="text-align:left;">age</th>' +
    ['ax','mx','qx','lx','dx','Lx','Tx','ex'].map(h => '<th style="text-align:right;">' + h + '</th>').join('') + '</tr>' +
    fRows.map(r =>
      '<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td>' + fmtAge(r.age_group) + '</td>' +
      '<td style="text-align:right;">' + (r.ax != null ? r.ax.toFixed(2) : '—') + '</td>' +
      ['mx','qx'].map(k => '<td style="text-align:right;">' + (r[k] != null ? r[k].toFixed(5) : '—') + '</td>').join('') +
      ['lx','dx','Lx','Tx'].map(k => '<td style="text-align:right;">' + (r[k] != null ? Math.round(r[k]).toLocaleString('en-US') : '—') + '</td>').join('') +
      '<td style="text-align:right;font-weight:bold;">' + (r.ex != null ? r.ex.toFixed(2) : '—') + '</td></tr>').join('');
}

function renderSeries(comp, year) {
  const series = e0comp[comp] || {};
  const f = x => x == null ? '—' : x.toFixed(2);
  let head = '<tr style="border-bottom:2px solid #ccc;"><th style="text-align:left;">year</th>' +
    ['e₀ Total','e₀ Males','e₀ Females'].map(h => '<th style="text-align:right;">' + h + '</th>').join('') + '</tr>';
  let body = YEARS.map(function(y) {
    const r = series[y];
    const cur = y === year ? ' style="background:#e0f2f1;font-weight:bold;"' : '';
    if (!r) return '<tr' + cur + '><td>' + y + '</td><td colspan="3" style="text-align:right;color:#999;">no data</td></tr>';
    return '<tr' + cur + '><td>' + y + '</td>' +
      ['e0_T','e0_M','e0_F'].map(k => '<td style="text-align:right;">' + f(r[k]) + '</td>').join('') + '</tr>';
  }).join('');
  document.getElementById('seriesTable').innerHTML = head + body;
  const cur = series[year];
  document.getElementById('seriesNote').textContent =
    cur && cur.flags ? 'Flags (' + year + '): ' + cur.flags : '';
}

function showComp() {
  if (!selected) selected = NATIONAL;
  const comp = selected.name, year = getYear();
  const isNational = comp === NATIONAL.name;
  document.getElementById('compInfo').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('resetComp').style.display = isNational ? 'none' : 'inline-block';
  document.getElementById('compName').textContent = comp +
    (isNational ? ' (nazionale)' : '') + ' — life table ' + year;
  renderFullTable(comp, year);
  renderCharts(comp, year);
  renderSeries(comp, year);
}

async function updateMap() {
  const year = getYear();
  document.getElementById('yearDisplay').textContent = year;
  if (!geojsonCache[year]) {
    geojsonCache[year] = await fetch('../data/geojson/province_' + year + '.geojson').then(r => r.json());
  }
  currentBreaks = computeBreaks();
  if (currentLayer) map.removeLayer(currentLayer);
  currentLayer = L.geoJSON(geojsonCache[year], {style: style, onEachFeature: onEachFeature}).addTo(map);
  map.fitBounds(currentLayer.getBounds(), {padding: [10, 10]});
  updateLegend();
  showComp();
}

function updateLegend() {
  const div = document.getElementById('legendContent');
  if (!div || !currentBreaks) return;
  const sexLabel = document.getElementById('sexSelect').selectedOptions[0].text;
  let html = '<strong>e₀ (' + sexLabel + '), years</strong>';
  html += '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + COLORS[0] + '"></i><span>&lt; ' + currentBreaks[0].toFixed(1) + '</span></div>';
  for (let i = 0; i < currentBreaks.length; i++) {
    const next = currentBreaks[i + 1];
    const clr = COLORS[Math.min(i + 1, COLORS.length - 1)];
    html += next
      ? '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + clr + '"></i><span>' + currentBreaks[i].toFixed(1) + '–' + next.toFixed(1) + '</span></div>'
      : '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + clr + '"></i><span>&gt; ' + currentBreaks[i].toFixed(1) + '</span></div>';
  }
  html += '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:#e5e7eb"></i><span>no data</span></div>';
  div.innerHTML = html;
}

function init() {
  const slider = document.getElementById('yearSlider');
  slider.max = YEARS.length - 1;
  slider.value = Math.max(0, YEARS.indexOf(DEFAULT_YEAR));
  document.getElementById('yearTicks').innerHTML =
    YEARS.map(y => '<span>' + y + '</span>').join('');
  slider.addEventListener('input', updateMap);
  document.getElementById('sexSelect').addEventListener('change', updateMap);
  document.getElementById('resetComp').addEventListener('click', function() {
    selected = NATIONAL; showComp();
  });
  document.getElementById('legendToggle').addEventListener('click', function() {
    const hidden = document.getElementById('legendWrapper').classList.toggle('legend-hidden');
    this.textContent = hidden ? 'Show' : 'Hide';
  });
  updateMap();
}

loadData().then(init);
</script>

<div style="margin-top:2rem;padding-top:1rem;border-top:1px solid #ddd;font-size:0.9rem;color:#555;">
<p><strong>Method.</strong> Abridged period life tables by <em>compartimento</em>
(historical region) and sex, 19 age groups (0, 1–4, then 5-year groups to 85+), at
seven decennial benchmarks (<strong>1871, 1881, 1901, 1911, 1921, 1931, 1936</strong>),
computed from deaths by age and sex (<em>Movimento dello stato civile</em>) and census
populations. Methodology follows the
<a href="https://www.mortality.org/Data/MethodsProtocol">Human Mortality Database Methods
Protocol</a> (v6): a₀ from the Andreev–Kingkade (2015) sex-specific formulas as a function
of m₀ (total sex: death-weighted average of the male and female values); ₄a₁ = 1.5,
ₙaₓ = n/2 elsewhere; qₓ = n·mₓ / (1 + (n − aₓ)·mₓ); open interval 85+ closed with
q = 1, a = 1/m, L = l/m. The national table (REGNO, shown when no compartimento is
selected) is computed from the sum of deaths and populations over the tabulated
compartimenti; its e₀ matches the official ISTAT period tables (e.g. 43.4 / 44.4 / 54.9 / 56.8
for 1901 / 1911 / 1931 / 1936).</p>
<p>There are no compartimento-level geometries, so the map renders the e₀ of each
compartimento onto the historical provincial boundaries of the selected year: every
province is shaded with its compartimento's e₀ (compartimento→province mapping from
<code>build_lifetables_comp.py</code>). Coverage reflects the sources:
<strong>Venezia Tridentina</strong> appears only from 1931, and the provinces of
<strong>Venezia Giulia e Zara</strong> are not yet covered — these stay grey, which is
expected. Click any province to load its compartimento's full Chiang life table,
lₓ / qₓ curves and e₀ history; use <em>← REGNO (nazionale)</em> to return to the
national table.</p>
<p><strong>Download:</strong>
<a href="../data/mortality/lifetables_comp.csv" download>lifetables_comp.csv</a> (full life tables, 7 dates, sexes T/M/F, incl. REGNO) ·
<a href="../data/mortality/e0_comp.csv" download>e0_comp.csv</a> (e₀ by compartimento, 7 dates) ·
<a href="../data/mortality/e0_comp_byprov.csv" download>e0_comp_byprov.csv</a> (per-province colouring).</p>
<p>Preliminary — test environment.</p>
</div>
```
</content>
</invoke>
